framing: Senior Electrical Engineer in oil & gas seeking renewables transition

jd.title: Lead Electrical Engineer — Solar & Battery Storage

requirements.text: 10+ years of electrical engineering experience in power generation or energy sector
Experience with utility-scale solar PV or battery energy storage systems (BESS)
Knowledge of power system protection, SCADA, and grid interconnection
Experience with ETAP, PSS/E, or equivalent power system simulation software
Familiarity with IEC, IEEE, and GCC Interconnection Authority (GCCIA) standards for grid-connected systems
Experience managing EPC contractor deliverables and design reviews
PE license or Chartered Engineer (CEng) status
Experience with Saudi Electricity Company (SEC) grid code
Experience with NEOM or Vision 2030 energy projects

responsibilities: Lead electrical engineering for 1.5GW solar PV and 500MWh BESS projects
Review and approve EPC contractor electrical designs, single-line diagrams, and protection schemes
Perform power system studies (load flow, short circuit, transient stability) using ETAP
Coordinate grid interconnection studies and compliance with SEC grid code
Manage electrical engineering team of 6 engineers across design and commissioning phases
Ensure compliance with IEC/IEEE standards and Saudi building codes

expected_output.summary: Senior Electrical Engineer with 13 years of power generation experience transitioning from oil & gas to renewables. 8 years at Saudi Aramco managing electrical systems for gas turbine power plants (2.4GW combined capacity), followed by 2 years at NEOM leading electrical infrastructure for green hydrogen project. PE licensed with deep expertise in power protection, SCADA systems, and ETAP modeling. MS Power Engineering.

experience.title: Senior Electrical Engineer — Green Hydrogen
bullets: Led electrical engineering for 400MW electrolyzer facility powered by 4GW wind and solar
Reviewed EPC contractor electrical designs including MV/HV switchgear, transformers, and protection systems
Performed grid interconnection studies using ETAP for connection to Saudi national grid
Coordinated with SEC on grid code compliance for intermittent renewable generation sources

experience.title: Electrical Engineer III — Power Generation
bullets: Managed electrical maintenance and reliability for gas turbine power plants (2.4GW combined capacity across 3 facilities)
Performed power system protection coordination studies for 230kV and 115kV transmission systems
Led SCADA system upgrade project integrating ABB and Siemens PLCs with central control room
Supervised team of 8 electrical technicians across preventive and corrective maintenance programs
Achieved 98.5% electrical system availability through predictive maintenance and thermal imaging programs

experience.title: Electrical Design Engineer
bullets: Designed MV/LV power distribution systems for industrial and commercial projects
Performed load flow and short circuit analysis using ETAP for 10+ projects
Prepared single-line diagrams, cable sizing calculations, and equipment specifications

certifications: Professional Engineer (PE) — Saudi Council of Engineers
education: BSc Electrical Engineering — University of Jordan (2007-2012)

jd_requirements: 10+ years electrical engineering power generation energy
power system protection SCADA grid interconnection
Saudi Electricity Company SEC grid code
deliberate_flaws: No direct solar PV or BESS experience (NEOM was green hydrogen / electrolyzer, not solar farm)
Oil & gas background — needs to frame transferable skills for renewables
SCADA experience is industrial, not utility-scale renewable
PE is Saudi, may need local equivalence verification
